auth.description: All endpoints except POST /api/auth/login require Bearer token in header: Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>

i18n.description: Send Accept-Language header to receive localized error messages and response texts. Example: Accept-Language: vi

commonHeaders.Authorization: Bearer <accessToken> (required for all endpoints except login)

responseWrapping.description: All successful responses are wrapped by TransformInterceptor

vi.message: Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng

routes.description: Login with email/password

401.vi: Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng

routes.description: Logout current user
List all currencies with exchange rates to VND
Create a new currency with exchange rate. VND is built-in (rate=1) and does not need to be created.

requestBody.name: string (required, e.g. 'Tether')
requestBody.rateToVnd: number (required, min 0, exchange rate to VND)

routes.description: Update currency info or exchange rate. Use this to update rateToVnd when rates change (manually or via external API later).
Delete a currency. Only allowed if no assets are using this currency.

409.en: Cannot delete currency {code}. {count} assets are using it.
409.vi: Không thể xóa loại tiền {code}. Có {count} tài sản đang sử dụng.

routes.description: List transactions with filters, search and pagination

query.search: string? - search by asset code (case insensitive)

routes.description: Get most recent transactions
Create new transaction. If action is BAN (sell), validates sufficient holdings.

400 (asset not registered).en: Asset {code} is not registered. Please create the asset first.
400 (asset not registered).vi: Tài sản {code} chưa được đăng ký. Vui lòng tạo tài sản trước.

400 (insufficient holdings).vi: Không đủ số lượng nắm giữ. Khả dụng: {available}, yêu cầu: {requested}

routes.description: Delete a single transaction by ID
Bulk delete multiple transactions by IDs

requestBody.ids: string[] (UUID array, required, each must be valid UUID v4)

routes.description: Import transactions from CSV file. Validates each row: asset must exist, sell quantity checked against holdings. Returns success/error counts.

csvFormat.description: CSV must have a header row. Required columns: date, assetType, assetCode, action, quantity, unitPrice. Optional: note, icon, iconBg. Column aliases supported: type→assetType, code→assetCode, price→unitPrice

errors.message: Insufficient holdings for BTC. Available: 0.5, requested: 1

routes.description: Get all prices, optionally filtered by asset type
Create or update price entry. Returns 201 for new, 200 for update.
Update price by asset code

Refresh all asset prices from external APIs. Crypto via CoinGecko (BTC, ETH, etc), stocks via VnStock (during trading hours 9h-15h Vietnam time only). Metal/savings are not auto-fetched. Prices are cached for 5 minutes.

notes.cachingStrategy: Crypto: cached 5 min (CoinGecko free = 10k calls/month). Stocks: cached 5 min during trading hours (9h-15h ICT Mon-Fri), no API call outside hours.
notes.supportedCrypto: BTC, ETH, USDT, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, DOT, MATIC, LINK, UNI, AVAX, ATOM, NEAR, APT, SUI

routes.description: Get live price for a specific asset with caching. Only works for crypto and stock types.
Get portfolio summary including total value, profit, and holdings count
Get current holdings breakdown with cost basis and profit/loss per asset

data.name: string
data.value: number (VND, total current value converted via rateToVnd)

routes.description: Get portfolio allocation breakdown by asset type (metal, crypto, stock)

data.label: string (display name: Metal, Crypto, Stock, Savings)

routes.description: Get profit/loss percentage per asset, sorted by profit descending
Get portfolio value history over time (monthly data points)
List all registered investment assets, optionally filtered by type
Create a new investment asset. Must be created before adding transactions for this asset.

requestBody.name: string (required, display name, e.g. 'Vàng SJC')
requestBody.currency: string? (optional, default 'VND', must be a registered currency code)
requestBody.interestRate: number? (required for savings, annual rate %, e.g. 5.5)
requestBody.termMonths: number? (required for savings, term in months, e.g. 12)
requestBody.maturityDate: string? (optional, for savings, ISO date e.g. '2026-01-15')

routes.description: Update an existing asset's info (name, type, icon, iconBg). All fields are optional.
Delete an asset. Only allowed if no transactions exist for this asset.

400.en: Cannot delete asset {code}. It has {count} transactions. Delete transactions first.
400.vi: Không thể xóa tài sản {code}. Có {count} giao dịch liên quan. Hãy xóa giao dịch trước.

routes.description: Get detailed asset info including FIFO P&L calculation, holdings metrics, realized/unrealized PnL, and value history

holdings.detail: string (localized: '3 buy orders · 1 sell orders' or '3 lệnh mua · 1 lệnh bán')

realizedPnl.total: number (VND, total realized profit from sells)

unrealizedPnl.total: number (VND, unrealized profit on remaining lots)
unrealizedPnl.totalCost: number (VND, cost basis of remaining lots)

valueHistory.value: number (VND, portfolio value at each transaction)

routes.description: Get paginated transactions for a specific asset within a time period
Get current allocation vs strategic targets. Status is 'overweight' if actual > target + 2%, 'underweight' if actual < target - 2%, otherwise 'on-target'.

data.name: string (Metal, Crypto, Stock, Savings)
data.value: number (VND, total value for this type)

routes.description: Set allocation targets. All target percentages must sum to exactly 100%.

data.total: number (sum of all targets, should be 100)

400.en: Target percentages must sum to 100. Current total: {total}
400.vi: Tổng phần trăm mục tiêu phải bằng 100. Tổng hiện tại: {total}

routes.description: Get rebalancing recommendations based on current allocation vs targets. Only suggests actions if deviation > 2% of total portfolio value.

data.summary: Portfolio has deviated from strategic targets. Rebalancing recommended.
Danh mục đã lệch khỏi mục tiêu chiến lược. Khuyến nghị tái cân bằng.

routes.description: Get monthly performance data broken down by asset type over time
Get financial summary including deposited/withdrawn amounts and realized/unrealized PnL (FIFO calculation)

data.unrealizedPnl: number (VND, unrealized profit on current holdings)

routes.description: Get monthly cash flow showing buy (inflow) and sell (outflow) amounts
Get top performing assets ranked by current portfolio value
Compare profit/loss performance across all currently held assets
Get DCA (Dollar Cost Averaging) chart data for an asset, showing purchase amounts and running average cost

data.avgCostPrices: number[] (running average cost after each purchase)

routes.description: Get detailed DCA purchase history for an asset (buy orders only, numbered sequentially)
Compare DCA strategy vs lump sum investment for an asset. Lump sum assumes buying all at the first purchase price.
List all financial goals with calculated progress. If goal has linkedAssets, progress is calculated from current portfolio holdings. Otherwise uses manual currentAmount.

progress.onTrack: boolean (linear projection reaches target by deadline)

routes.description: Get aggregated goals summary with counts by status

data.onTrackCount: number (on track but not yet completed)

routes.description: Get a specific financial goal with detailed progress

404.vi: Không tìm thấy mục tiêu tài chính

routes.description: Create a new financial goal. Link to specific assets for auto progress tracking, or leave linkedAssets empty and use currentAmount for manual tracking.

requestBody.name: string (required, goal name)
requestBody.linkedAssets: string[]? (optional, asset codes to track, e.g. ['BTC', 'ETH'])
requestBody.currentAmount: number? (optional, manual current amount when not linked)

routes.description: Update a financial goal. All fields optional.

404.vi: Không tìm thấy mục tiêu tài chính

routes.description: Delete a financial goal

404.vi: Không tìm thấy mục tiêu tài chính

400.description: Validation failed or business rule violated
